name: @ai-native-methodology/chain-coverage-validator
description: v2.0 chain 정합 validator — UC→BHV→AC link coverage / verifiable / cross_links 의무 / coverage ≥ 0.85 ratchet. v8.11.0 — validateRisksForm lane 신설 (Senior REVISE-1 흡수 / risks_and_constraints string form legacy carry warn). v9.0.4 — autoDetectProjectRoot 신설 (F-MB-VAL-001 / `.aimd/output/<file>.json` 패턴 자동 PoC root 감지 / 5 PoC self-corroboration / default mismatch silent sink 해소).
